rationale: HLA-A class I promoter shore, ~1.3kb upstream of TSS (NCBI GTR NC_000006.12:29942532..29945870, + strand); anchor window, methylated in naive T vs open in monocyte (real Delta-beta approx 0.35 at this width; verified wide 4kb window averages contrast down to ~0.085 -- narrow shore only)

HLA-B class I promoter shore, ~1.3kb upstream of TSS (NCBI GTR NC_000006.12:31353875..31357179, complement strand; TSS=31357179, shore is on the higher-coordinate side since gene is minus strand); class I promoter carries cell-type-variable shore methylation, methylated in naive T vs open in monocyte, same direction as the HLA-A anchor

HLA-C class I promoter shore, ~1.3kb upstream of TSS (NCBI GTR NC_000006.12:31268749..31272092, complement strand; TSS=31272092, shore upstream = higher coordinate); class I promoter, methylated in naive T vs open in monocyte

HLA-DRB1 class II promoter shore, ~1.3kb upstream of TSS (NCBI GTR NC_000006.12:32578775..32589848, complement strand; TSS=32589848, shore upstream = higher coordinate); class II is constitutively expressed in professional APCs (monocyte), so promoter shore is open/hypomethylated in monocyte vs methylated in naive T -- direction flipped vs class I

HLA-DQB1 class II promoter shore, ~1.3kb upstream of TSS (NCBI GTR NC_000006.12:32659467..32666657, complement strand; TSS=32666657, shore upstream = higher coordinate); class II APC-specific hypomethylation, open in monocyte vs T

L1HS (young full-length LINE-1) 5' UTR/promoter window, from rmsk.txt element chr2:160114516-160120680 (+strand, 6164bp, repName=L1HS, repClass=LINE, repFamily=L1); window is the first 1kb (5' end, sense+antisense promoter) since element is + strand; young L1 5' UTR promoters are broadly hypomethylated in myeloid/monocyte relative to lymphoid/T lineage

L1HS (young full-length LINE-1) 5' UTR/promoter window, from rmsk.txt element chr9:2515633-2521964 (-strand, 6331bp, repName=L1HS, repClass=LINE, repFamily=L1); window is the last 1kb of the genomic interval (5' end of the element, since -strand) -- same myeloid-hypomethylation direction as line1_l1hs_chr2, independent genomic locus

HERV-K(HML-2) 5' LTR/promoter window, from rmsk.txt full-length provirus chr5:30486652-30496098 (-strand; structure LTR5_Hs 30486652-30487612 / HERVK-int 30487707-30495147 (7440bp) / LTR5_Hs 30495147-30496098, repClass=LTR, repFamily=ERVK); 5' LTR is the higher-coordinate LTR5_Hs since provirus is -strand; HERV-K LTRs carry lineage-specific methylation, hypomethylated/derepressed in myeloid vs lymphoid

HERV-K(HML-2) 5' LTR/promoter window, from rmsk.txt full-length provirus chr12:58327458-58336915 (-strand; structure LTR5_Hs 58327458-58328426 / HERVK-int 58328521-58335947 (7426bp) / LTR5_Hs 58335947-58336915, repClass=LTR, repFamily=ERVK); 5' LTR is the higher-coordinate LTR5_Hs since provirus is -strand -- independent locus from hervk_ltr_chr5, same direction
